simpleDefinition: A piece of paper that shows you paid for something.
exampleSentence: Can I have a receipt, please?
exampleThai: ขอใบเสร็จด้วยได้ไหมคะ?
imagePrompt: A simple paper receipt on a store counter, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Money returned to you when you give more than the price.
exampleSentence: Here is your change.
exampleThai: นี่คือเงินทอนของคุณค่ะ
imagePrompt: A hand giving back some coins, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A time when things are sold for less money.
exampleSentence: I bought this shirt on sale.
exampleThai: ฉันซื้อเสื้อตัวนี้ตอนลดราคา
imagePrompt: A red sale tag with a percentage on it, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A lower price for something.
exampleSentence: There is a 10% discount on shoes.
exampleThai: มีส่วนลด 10% สำหรับรองเท้า
imagePrompt: A price tag showing a discount symbol, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: How big or small something is.
exampleSentence: What size do you wear?
exampleThai: คุณใส่เสื้อผ้าขนาดอะไร?
imagePrompt: Different sizes of shirts small, medium, large, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Ready for people to go in and buy things.
exampleSentence: The shop is open every day.
exampleThai: ร้านเปิดทุกวัน
imagePrompt: An 'Open' sign hanging on a shop door, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Not open for business.
exampleSentence: Sorry, the market is closed now.
exampleThai: ขอโทษค่ะ ตลาดปิดแล้วตอนนี้
imagePrompt: A 'Closed' sign on a store window, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: ห้างสรรพสินค้า
simpleDefinition: A large building with many different shops.
exampleSentence: We are going to the mall on Sunday.
exampleThai: พวกเราจะไปห้างสรรพสินค้าในวันอาทิตย์
imagePrompt: A large modern shopping mall building, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A place where people buy and sell food and things.
exampleSentence: She buys vegetables at the market.
exampleThai: เธอซื้อผักที่ตลาด
imagePrompt: An outdoor market stall with fruits and vegetables, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A place where you can buy things.
exampleSentence: There is a small store near my house.
exampleThai: มีร้านค้าเล็กๆ อยู่ใกล้บ้านของฉัน
imagePrompt: A small local shop with a sign, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A large basket on wheels used in a supermarket.
exampleSentence: Put the milk in the cart.
exampleThai: ใส่นมลงในรถเข็น
imagePrompt: A metal shopping cart in a supermarket, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Something you carry to hold items while shopping.
exampleSentence: I only need a small basket.
exampleThai: ฉันต้องการแค่ตะกร้าใบเล็ก
imagePrompt: A plastic shopping basket with handles, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A person who buys things from a shop.
exampleSentence: The shop has many customers today.
exampleThai: วันนี้ร้านมีลูกค้าเยอะมาก
imagePrompt: A person buying items at a store counter, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: พนักงานขาย
simpleDefinition: A person who works in a shop to help customers.
exampleSentence: The shop assistant is very helpful.
exampleThai: พนักงานขายช่วยเหลือดีมาก
imagePrompt: A friendly shop assistant wearing a uniform, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: บิล / ใบแจ้งหนี้
simpleDefinition: A piece of paper showing how much money you must pay.
exampleSentence: Can we have the bill, please?
exampleThai: ขอเก็บบิลด้วยค่ะ
imagePrompt: A restaurant bill on a small tray, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: To give money to pay for something.
exampleSentence: I spend too much money on clothes.
exampleThai: ฉันใช้จ่ายเงินไปกับเสื้อผ้ามากเกินไป
imagePrompt: A person handing cash from a wallet, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Money in coins or notes.
exampleSentence: Do you pay by card or in cash?
exampleThai: คุณจ่ายด้วยบัตรหรือเงินสดคะ?
imagePrompt: A stack of paper cash money, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: The flat part of a computer or phone where you see pictures and words.
exampleSentence: Look at the screen.
exampleThai: มองไปที่หน้าจอ
imagePrompt: A bright computer screen, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: The board with buttons used to type on a computer.
exampleSentence: I need a new keyboard.
exampleThai: ฉันต้องการแป้นพิมพ์อันใหม่
imagePrompt: A standard computer keyboard, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: เมาส์ (คอมพิวเตอร์)
simpleDefinition: A small thing you use to move the arrow on a computer screen.
exampleSentence: Click the button with your mouse.
exampleThai: คลิกปุ่มด้วยเมาส์ของคุณ
imagePrompt: A wireless computer mouse, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: An object that provides power to machines like phones.
exampleSentence: My phone battery is low.
exampleThai: แบตเตอรี่โทรศัพท์ของฉันใกล้หมด
imagePrompt: A battery icon with low energy, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A device used to put electricity into a battery.
exampleSentence: Where is my phone charger?
exampleThai: ที่ชาร์จโทรศัพท์ของฉันอยู่ที่ไหน?
imagePrompt: A phone connected to a charging cable, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A written message you send from your phone.
exampleSentence: Send me a text when you arrive.
exampleThai: ส่งข้อความมาหาฉันเมื่อคุณมาถึงนะ
imagePrompt: A speech bubble representing a text message, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: แชท / พูดคุยออนไลน์
simpleDefinition: To talk to someone online using text.
exampleSentence: I like to chat with my friends.
exampleThai: ฉันชอบแชทกับเพื่อนของฉัน
imagePrompt: Two chat bubbles overlapping, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: ไฟล์ (ข้อมูล)
simpleDefinition: Information or a document stored on a computer.
exampleSentence: Please save the file.
exampleThai: กรุณาบันทึกไฟล์ด้วย
imagePrompt: A digital computer file document icon, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A picture taken with a camera or phone.
exampleSentence: Can you take a photo of us?
exampleThai: คุณช่วยถ่ายรูปพวกเราได้ไหม?
imagePrompt: A picture frame showing a landscape, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Moving pictures that you can watch on a screen.
exampleSentence: I love watching funny videos.
exampleThai: ฉันชอบดูวิดีโอตลกๆ
imagePrompt: A play button over a video screen, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A piece of equipment used to take photos or videos.
exampleSentence: My phone has a good camera.
exampleThai: โทรศัพท์ของฉันมีกล้องที่ดี
imagePrompt: A digital camera or a phone camera lens, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: เครื่องพิมพ์
simpleDefinition: A machine that puts words or pictures from a computer onto paper.
exampleSentence: We need paper for the printer.
exampleThai: พวกเราต้องการกระดาษสำหรับเครื่องพิมพ์
imagePrompt: An office printer with a piece of paper coming out, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: To press a button on a computer mouse.
exampleSentence: Click the link to open the page.
exampleThai: คลิกลิงก์เพื่อเปิดหน้านี้
imagePrompt: A computer cursor pointing at a button, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: To write words on a computer or phone by pressing keys.
exampleSentence: She can type very fast.
exampleThai: เธอสามารถพิมพ์ได้เร็วมาก
imagePrompt: Fingers typing on a keyboard, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: A secret word you use to log into a computer or app.
exampleSentence: I forgot my password.
exampleThai: ฉันลืมรหัสผ่านของฉัน
imagePrompt: A lock symbol with stars representing a hidden password, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: เว็บ / เครือข่ายอินเทอร์เน็ต
simpleDefinition: The system of information on the Internet.
exampleSentence: I found this information on the web.
exampleThai: ฉันพบข้อมูลนี้บนเว็บ
imagePrompt: A globe with internet connection lines, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: แอปพลิเคชัน
simpleDefinition: A computer program for a phone or tablet.
exampleSentence: I downloaded a new game app.
exampleThai: ฉันดาวน์โหลดแอปเกมใหม่
imagePrompt: A smartphone showing several application icons on screen, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Wanting to rest or sleep.
exampleSentence: I am very tired after work.
exampleThai: ฉันเหนื่อยมากหลังเลิกงาน
imagePrompt: A person yawning, looking exhausted, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Feeling that you want to drink water.
exampleSentence: Can I have some water? I'm thirsty.
exampleThai: ขอตัวน้ำหน่อยได้ไหม? ฉันหิวน้ำ
imagePrompt: A person thinking about a glass of water, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Wanting to eat food.
exampleSentence: I am hungry, let's eat.
exampleThai: ฉันหิวแล้ว ไปกินข้าวกันเถอะ
imagePrompt: A person holding their stomach thinking of food, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Feeling fear or worry.
exampleSentence: She is afraid of spiders.
exampleThai: เธอกลัวแมงมุม
imagePrompt: A scared face expression, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Having a strong feeling of being upset with someone.
exampleSentence: He was angry because I was late.
exampleThai: เขาโกรธเพราะฉันมาสาย
imagePrompt: An angry face with furrowed eyebrows, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Feeling unhappy because you have nothing to do.
exampleSentence: I am bored with this movie.
exampleThai: ฉันเบื่อกับหนังเรื่องนี้
imagePrompt: A person sighing, looking uninterested, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Feeling very happy and eager.
exampleSentence: I am excited about the trip.
exampleThai: ฉันตื่นเต้นกับทริปนี้
imagePrompt: A person jumping with a wide happy smile, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: เสียใจ / ขอโทษ
simpleDefinition: Feeling sad about something you did wrong.
exampleSentence: I am sorry for breaking the cup.
exampleThai: ฉันขอโทษที่ทำถ้วยแตก
imagePrompt: A sad face looking down regretfully, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Feeling happy about something.
exampleSentence: I am glad to see you again.
exampleThai: ฉันดีใจที่ได้พบคุณอีกครั้ง
imagePrompt: A bright smiling face expression, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Knowing that something is true.
exampleSentence: Are you sure about that?
exampleThai: คุณแน่ใจเกี่ยวกับเรื่องนั้นไหม?
imagePrompt: A person nodding with confidence, flat vector style.

thaiMeaning: หนาว / เย็น
simpleDefinition: Feeling that the temperature is low.
exampleSentence: I am cold, close the window.
exampleThai: ฉันหนาว ปิดหน้าต่างหน่อย
imagePrompt: A person shivering wrapped in a blanket, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Feeling that the temperature is high.
exampleSentence: It is very hot today.
exampleThai: วันนี้อากาศร้อนมาก
imagePrompt: A person wiping sweat from their forehead, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Having a lot of things to do.
exampleSentence: I am too busy to talk right now.
exampleThai: ฉันยุ่งเกินกว่าจะคุยตอนนี้
imagePrompt: A person juggling many tasks at a desk, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Having time to do what you want.
exampleSentence: Are you free this weekend?
exampleThai: สุดสัปดาห์นี้คุณว่างไหม?
imagePrompt: A person relaxing on a chair with no work, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Not healthy or feeling well.
exampleSentence: He cannot go to school because he is sick.
exampleThai: เขาไปโรงเรียนไม่ได้เพราะเขาป่วย
imagePrompt: A person in bed with a thermometer in their mouth, flat vector style.

simpleDefinition: Feeling well and okay.
exampleSentence: I am fine, thank you.
exampleThai: ฉันสบายดี ขอบคุณ
imagePrompt: A person giving a thumbs up and smiling, flat vector style.
